defaults.title: Restore System Defaults
defaults.description: Use this option if you notice that options like "Asset Types" or "Emotional States" are missing.
defaults.warning: Safe for use: This action checks the integrity of core system data and recreates only what is missing or incorrect. Your trades and accounts will NOT be deleted.
defaults.confirm: This will check and fix missing default data (Currencies, Asset Types, etc.), without erasing your data. Do you wish to continue?

demo.title: Demo Data
demo.description: Generate or remove sample trades to test features.
demo.deleteWarning: Warning: This action will permanently remove trades from selected accounts.

demo.successClean: All demo trades have been removed!
demo.selectAccount: Please select at least one account

danger.title: Danger Zone: Full Reset
danger.description: Erases all data and recreates the database from scratch with factory data.
danger.warning: CAUTION: All your trades, accounts, and customizations will be lost.
danger.confirm: WARNING: This will erase ALL data (Trades, Accounts, Settings) and recreate the database with initial sample data. Are you absolutely sure?
